summary: Light rain still makes hems and shoe uppers worth managing
body: Light rain still makes hems and shoe uppers worth managing

bottomwear: For rain, avoid hems that drag and fabrics that soak up water easily.
shoes: Favor closed shoes that do not take on water easily, and keep an umbrella nearby.

summary: In steady rain, outer-layer usefulness matters more than styling
body: In steady rain, outer-layer usefulness matters more than styling

dominant_factors: Steady rain makes a weather-aware outer layer and practical shoes much more important.

summary: Snowy conditions demand traction, not just warmth
body: Snowy conditions demand traction, not just warmth

shoes: In snow, prioritize traction, foot coverage, and socks that hold warmth without bulk.

summary: On windy days, shell structure and closure matter more than pure thickness
body: On windy days, shell structure and closure matter more than pure thickness

dominant_factors: Wind is a dominant factor here, so outerwear should block movement of air, not just add bulk.

summary: In very humid weather, fabric choice changes comfort directly
body: In very humid weather, fabric choice changes comfort directly

notes: High humidity favors dry-feeling, breathable, or quick-drying fabrics.

summary: Dry air makes small accessories and comfort items more useful
body: Dry air makes small accessories and comfort items more useful

shoes: Accessories can focus on scarf, mask, or comfort items instead of simply adding heavier clothing.

summary: Large day-night swings call for one removable layer
body: Large day-night swings call for one removable layer

dominant_factors: The day swings enough to justify one removable carry layer.

summary: Office AC can push a warm day back into layering territory
body: Office AC can push a warm day back into layering territory

occasion_adjustments: If office AC is likely, keep one light removable layer in the outfit.

summary: If you will walk a lot, support and movement room deserve more priority
body: If you will walk a lot, support and movement room deserve more priority

occasion_adjustments: If the day involves a lot of walking, prioritize shoe support and easier movement over decorative styling.

summary: For exercise, sweat handling and low-friction comfort beat static warmth
body: For exercise, sweat handling and low-friction comfort beat static warmth

occasion_adjustments: For exercise, prioritize quick-dry fabrics, stretch, and shoe support.

summary: On sunny mild-to-warm days, UV accessories become genuinely useful
body: On sunny mild-to-warm days, UV accessories become genuinely useful

shoes: On sunny days, think hat, sunglasses, and UV basics before adding more clothing.

summary: On cool days, tights make skirts much more stable to wear
body: On cool days, tights make skirts much more stable to wear

bottomwear: If you want a skirt on a cool day, pair it with tights or a steadier boot option.
